title: Glade
description: Lightweight, up-to date, fun, feature-packed and functional 🌳
body:
![Glade Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64127124726f08960f77961335d325902de6c497.webp)
Like a clearing in a vast forest, Glade invites you to rest in the warm glow of the sun and venture into the unknown in search of adventure. ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b863c38a18b4b0ad4571ad26fd4155da0ba2b125.webp)
### What is Glade? Glade is a Minecraft modpack that blends the comfort of building a lasting home with the excitement of exploration and challenge. #### What does this mean? - Glade is an enhanced vanilla experience - When Glade updates to a new Minecraft version, you can relax knowing that the modpack will be compatible with your current world. Make one that you can enjoy even in 10 years time! - The selection of game-changing content mods is slim and made up of mods that I (Khazoda) have made myself. This way I don't risk other mod authors no longer updating their mods alongside Minecraft. - There are a myriad of clientside quality of experience mods that enhance visuals, performance and gameplay. This selection may change from version to version but won't affect your worlds. ### Who is this modpack for? - Primarily, this modpack is made for me and my personal long-term server. I've loved playing Minecraft since 2011, but enjoyed playing modded Minecraft so much that I never ended up with a long-term world. In June 2024 I finally wanted to change that, so I made this modpack. So whether you're in the same boat as me, or just want a fresh-feeling vanilla+ experience to dive into for two weeks with your friends, give Glade a try 😊 ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b863c38a18b4b0ad4571ad26fd4155da0ba2b125.webp) ### List of Content Mods - Basic Weapons - Basic Storage - Bronze - Plushables - Block Breaker & Block Placer - Heirlooms
